title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks. Collaborate with designers and QA to deliver high-quality features.
requirements: Strong knowledge of React and Node.js
Experience with REST APIs and databases

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop cross-platform and native mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms.
requirements: Proficiency in React Native or Flutter

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive user interfaces and engaging experiences for web and mobile applications.
requirements: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD
Strong portfolio demonstrating web and mobile work

title: QA Engineer
description: Plan and execute manual and automated tests to ensure software quality before release.
requirements: Knowledge of test planning and bug reporting
Familiarity with automation tools is a plus

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and deployment processes for client projects.
requirements: Knowledge of Docker and CI/CD tools

title: Business Analyst
description: Gather requirements, document specifications, and bridge communication between clients and development teams.

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Support development teams in building features, fixing bugs, and learning best practices in software engineering.
requirements: Knowledge of at least one programming language
